title: Simple Soccer
description: Play Soccer (Football) matches with your friends with the integrated and accurate ball physx. Decorate your house with the wide variety of trophies, or play as the referee to prank your friends!
body:
This mod adds soccer to Minecraft.
- 

## The mod features things related to the sport such as:

- Soccer Balls
- Goal
- Gloves
- Whistle
- Yellow and Red cards
- And much more!

## The mod also features things like:

- Powershot key (R)
- Advanced Ball Physics
- Goalkeeper jumping (Z and C) (Gloves required)

Simple Soccer now has trophies and awards, such as:

- The World Cup
- The Champions League Trophy
- The European Championship Trophy
- The Libertadores Cup
- Ballon d'Or
- The Best FIFA
- The Golden Boot
- Puskas Award
- And much more to come!

Simple Soccer is great for when you want to play with your friends, or even alone!
It is very fun and will make a great addition to your Minecraft world.


## My future plans for this mod are:

- Bring it to more versions of the game

### Simple Soccer requires Geckolib to run.

#### Versions 1.2.3+ are NOT compatible with Optifine

### Thank you!
